content: Next.js 15 App Router is the standard full-stack React framework for 2025. Key features: Server Components for zero-bundle-size data fetching, Server Actions for form mutations (replaces most API routes), file-based routing, built-in Image/Font optimization. For internal tools and dashboards, Server Actions handle mutations and Route Handlers handle any REST endpoints (e.g., report exports). The App Router model with React 19 and TypeScript is the recommended approach for new projects.
